features.name: plugin.yaml loader + Goodhart guard
acceptance_criteria: load() reads plugin.yaml into Plugin dataclass

features.name: runner.py: agent-mode keep/revert loop
acceptance_criteria: run_step() reads .best state file, git commit or revert

features.name: runner.py: shinka UCB mode delegation
acceptance_criteria: mode='shinka' delegates full loop to evaluate.py main()
PYTHONPATH injects ShinkaEvolve root for subprocess

features.name: evaluate.py wrapper: autoresearch (val_bpb)
acceptance_criteria: runs train.py, parses val_bpb from stdout

features.name: evaluate.py wrapper: autoresearch-win-rtx (rank_ic)
acceptance_criteria: runs train.py, parses rank_ic from stdout

features.name: evaluate.py wrapper: parameter-golf (hyperparams via env)
acceptance_criteria: sets env vars, runs train_gpt_ours.py, parses val_bpb

features.name: hist-mat plugin (evaluate.py + plugin.yaml)
acceptance_criteria: evaluate.py runs hist-mat and parses P_risk or accuracy metric

features.name: multi-mutable file support
acceptance_criteria: runner uses all plugin.mutable entries (not just [0])
git add/checkout covers all mutable files
at least one plugin with 2 mutable files tested

features.name: verification gate hook
acceptance_criteria: pre-commit hook or run_step guard that runs pytest

features.name: results dashboard (gen score history)
acceptance_criteria: prints ASCII score curve or writes results.md
